notes: All 12 conditions unanimous empirical_test_agreed. All three must-find issues identified in every run. No must-not claims raised. ETD consistent: reader study with priors and specialist-majority panel.

All 12 conditions unanimous empirical_test_agreed. AUC-threshold misalignment identified universally. Monthly recalibration and call script invariance correctly assessed as non-issues. ETD: compute precision@2% and lift@2% from existing test data.
All 12 conditions unanimous critique_wins. Defenses were non-responsive to the metric issues. No must-not claims raised (45fps and brightness normalization correctly assessed as non-issues).

All 12 conditions unanimous empirical_test_agreed. Routine data and <5min latency correctly assessed as non-issues. AUROC not incorrectly condemned — critique is that it's insufficient for deployment authorization, not inappropriate for model comparison. ETD: PPV and alert rate at 2-alerts-per-shift threshold.

All 12 conditions unanimous critique_wins. Latency compliance correctly noted as non-issue. Recall@50 not incorrectly condemned as a metric — critique is that it's insufficient to justify skipping online holdback for a costly migration. Long-tail diversity observation noted but assessed as potentially increasing downstream filter risk.

All 12 conditions unanimous empirical_test_agreed. Equalized odds and AUROC correctly recognized as legitimate partial evidence — critique is about completeness, not invalidity. Legal review of proxy features correctly distinguished from group calibration. ETD: compute loss, approval rates by group, and group calibration from 1.1M-application retrospective data.

All 12 conditions unanimous critique_wins. 70ms latency correctly assessed as non-issue. Double-reviewed labels correctly assessed as not bridging NDCG-deflection gap. NDCG@10 not condemned as a metric — critique is that it doesn't predict the specific business outcome (ticket deflection) for this deployment decision.

coverage: All 7 assigned cases completed with 100% must-find issue identification across all 12 condition-run combinations per case. No must-not claims raised in any run. ETD specifications provided for all empirical_test_agreed verdicts.

notes: Hard clinical case. All conditions unanimously critique_wins. C-index vs. triage-metric distinction identified cleanly across all runs. External validation correctly identified as strength (not a flaw) in all conditions.

Easy temporal confound case. All conditions correctly resolve to empirical_test_agreed. Nurse-driven sepsis bundle and staffing change identified as primary confound. Hospital B exclusion identified as structural gap. Avoided false must_not_claim triggers (target leakage from lactate, GBDT interpretability, class imbalance).

Medium education confounding case. All conditions unanimously critique_wins. Post-treatment evaluation circularity identified correctly. Defender attempts operational-targeting rebuttal in some runs but correctly concedes accuracy claim. Avoided false must_not_claim triggers (dining card ethics, missing data handling, outreach programs).

Medium recommendation system confound. All conditions empirical_test_agreed. Promotion campaign identified as primary confound. Entrypoint mixing identified correctly. Avoided false must_not_claim triggers (stable ad load as proof of quality, larger candidate pool as flaw, English-market exclusion).

Medium temporal confound case. All conditions unanimously critique_wins. Holiday auto-decline policy identified as primary mechanism. Seasonal fraud mix shift identified. Avoided false must_not_claim triggers (fixed headcount, fresher training data as misconduct, transformer embeddings implying leakage).

Hard marketplace confound with auction-domain knowledge requirement. All conditions unanimously critique_wins. Reserve-price change mechanism correctly identified as direct revenue mechanism. Advertiser budget surge identified. Shadow auction as standard control correctly specified. Avoided false must_not_claim triggers (multi-task architecture as flaw, stable ad quality as proof, match expansion as leakage).

Hard power systems confound with domain-specific knowledge requirement. All conditions empirical_test_agreed. Interruptible-load contracts and TOU tariff identified as target-process changers. Weather vendor switch identified as input quality change. Avoided false must_not_claim triggers (MAPE unusable, ensemble as core flaw, weather vendor change as proof of overfitting).

must_find_coverage_summary: 100% across all 7 cases for all must_find_issue_ids
notes: All 7 assigned cases completed. Verdicts match acceptable_resolutions for all cases. No must_not_claim violations detected in any run.

All 3 must_find issues found in all 12 runs. No must_not_claim violations. Medication feature leakage raised as additional issue in 4 runs. Defender consistently conceded policy_sensitive_label and pooled_hospital_analysis; site_specific_workflow_shift always conceded.

All 3 must_find issues found in all 12 runs. ViT global statistics susceptibility raised in isolated_run3. Label source site correlation raised in ensemble_run3. Multi-round_run2 required one debate round before concession on SKIN-1.

Both must_find issues found in all 12 runs. No_margin_analysis raised as additional issue in isolated_run3 and ensemble_run2. Multi-round_run1 required one debate round on CHURN-1 (defender attempted pilot framing rebuttal, conceded after critic pressed).

Both must_find issues found in all 12 runs. Inverted_framing_recommendation raised in isolated_run3 and ensemble_run3. Multi-round_run1 required one debate round on MOD-1 (defender attempted necessary-condition rebuttal, conceded after critic pressed on specific framing language).

All 3 must_find issues found in all 12 runs. Consistent empirical_test_agreed verdict across all conditions. Defender consistently rebutted partially (mechanism plausible) while conceding simulation-not-deployment. Empirical test specified: prospective deployment measuring time-to-read and time-to-treatment. Parallel pathway escalation concern raised in multiple runs as important empirical question.

All 3 must_find issues found in all 12 runs. Consistent empirical_test_agreed verdict. Empirical test: champion-challenger pilot with graduated expansion plus regulatory pre-analysis. Ensemble_run3 assessor noted regulatory analysis is a pre-pilot prerequisite (important clarification). No must_not_claim violations: monotonic constraints not raised as methodological flaw in any run.

All 3 must_find issues found in all 12 runs. Consistent empirical_test_agreed verdict. Two-stage empirical test specified: wearable device validation (Stage 1) + alert-to-care-seeking pathway study (Stage 2). Paroxysmal episode duration shift raised in ensemble_run2. No must_not_claim violations: on-device efficiency not raised as flaw; oversampling not flagged as invalid; ICU models not characterized as useless outside hospitals.

summary: All 7 cases completed. 4 critique_wins cases (207, 205, 301, 308) produced critique_wins in all 12 runs each. 3 mixed cases (302, 303, 307) produced empirical_test_agreed in all 12 runs each. Must-find coverage: 100% across all cases and conditions. No must_not_claim violations detected in any run.

notes: Chronological CV concern — reviewer's concern is backwards on all runs across all conditions. Critic and Defender both independently identified reviewer error in isolated debate. Key disclosure item across runs: COVID window sensitivity, fold-level AUC stability reporting.

Threshold manipulation concern — 0.35 threshold is mathematically correct from 4.2:1 cost ratio, pre-specified one month before data analysis. All conditions unanimous. Key disclosure items: cost ratio derivation documentation, single-site generalizability, threshold sensitivity table.

AUPRC cherry-picking concern — reviewer has direction of cherry-picking backwards (AUPRC=0.61 < AUC-ROC=0.963). Pre-specified six weeks before training. Both metrics reported. All conditions unanimous. Key disclosure: AUPRC prevalence-dependence for benchmarking, deployment threshold metrics.

Logistic regression vs XGBoost — reviewer's performance argument fails given binding UDAAP and model risk management policy constraints. Pre-specified power analysis confirms AUC>=0.75 achievable, model achieves 0.779. All conditions unanimous. Multiround run 2 noted train/test split documentation gap.

Hardware heterogeneity confounding concern — deliberate domain generalization strategy validated by pre-analysis ablation (0.944 vs 0.887 AUC cross-site). All conditions unanimous. Multiround run 1 surfaced test set composition clarification (within-distribution vs cross-site labeling).

Catalog expansion regime change concern — team proactively tested pre/post nDCG@10 and found 0.02 difference, documented decision. Regime change concern is empirically dismissed. All conditions unanimous. Multiround runs surfaced cold-start handling and statistical characterization of 0.02 difference.

Loan officer tenure proxy discrimination concern — correctly handled by pre-deployment disparate impact analysis with legal counsel, no significant impact found. Feature removal not warranted. All conditions unanimous. Multiround run 3 raised output-level vs feature-level analysis distinction as a process completeness item.

Batch 5 complete. All 7 defense_wins cases produced unanimous defense_wins verdicts across all 4 conditions and 3 runs each. No contamination events. Multiround condition did not bias toward critic framing — Defender seeing Critique did not cause verdict drift toward critique_wins in any of the 21 multiround runs. ETD produced in 2 ensemble runs (009 runs 1 and 3) where output-level disparate impact analysis was specified as a required supplementary test.
All conditions and all runs converge on defense_wins. Both reviewer concerns (academic-only validation, lactate dependency) addressed by explicit scope documentation.
All conditions converge on defense_wins. Survivorship bias resolved by second-stage deployment constraint. Alternative data is compliance process concern.
All conditions converge on defense_wins. Post-crisis calibration concern addressed by stress supplement with two-tier PD approach. Loan officer scores are standard with audit procedures.

All conditions converge on defense_wins. Both committee concerns are scope errors — ACA community rating rules apply to member-facing premiums, not internal actuarial models. Outside counsel confirmed.
All conditions converge on critique_wins. Boilerplate global feature importance fails specific-reason requirement. Gradient boosting explanation gap is root technical cause.

All conditions converge on empirical_test_agreed. Three deployment-readiness concerns identified: safety-net distribution shift, capacity-driven threshold without cost-benefit analysis, HRRP externality not analyzed.

Isolated debate, multiround, and baseline converge on mixed. Ensemble converges on empirical_test_agreed with ETD constraint. Two issues: low-volume store MAPE gap (19.4% vs 8.3% overall) and no-override architectural gap for perishables.

summary: All 7 cases x 4 conditions x 3 runs completed. Defense_wins cases: 100% defense_wins across all conditions and runs. real_world_framing_004: 100% critique_wins (boilerplate adverse action + explanation gap). real_world_framing_001: 100% empirical_test_agreed (3 deployment-readiness concerns). real_world_framing_003: mixed/empirical_test_agreed split (isolated_debate/multiround/baseline=mixed, ensemble=empirical_test_agreed).

notes: All conditions identified all 3 must-find issues. Selection confound correctly identified as the primary evidentiary flaw. Prospective shadow validation unanimously agreed as required next step.

All conditions identified both must-find issues. Transit authority survey data grounding the feedback loop concern was correctly noted. Threshold issue universally conceded. A/B test across stop clusters is the agreed empirical test.
All conditions identified both must-find issues. CTR lift validated by all assessors — must_not_claim protections respected. Merchant audit as pre-deployment requirement identified unanimously.

All conditions identified all 3 must-find issues. Regulation E correctly identified as federal legal constraint (not rebuttable). Hard block architecture unanimously inappropriate. Some variation in verdict labeling (critique_wins vs empirical_test_agreed) across conditions; all agree architecture is wrong.

All conditions identified all 3 must-find issues. Hardware distribution shift correctly identified as the primary blocker. Autonomous reporting liability correctly identified as standard-of-care violation creating uninsured exposure. Domain knowledge of CT scanner physics demonstrated.

All conditions identified all 3 must-find issues. CAH federal designation and structural constraints correctly applied. Alert fatigue context correctly identified as making deployment counterproductive. Workflow actionability gap (no intensivists, nurse-patient ratios) correctly noted.

All conditions identified all 3 must-find issues. Equal Protection constitutional risk correctly identified for disparate impact without rural population assessment. First-contact defendant subgroup correctly identified as model blind spot more prevalent in rural counties.
